name: SQL: Termo LGPD
template:
select ds_conteudo, nr_sequencia
from CMDKRLS_CHAT_TERMO_USO
where dt_liberacao is not null
 and dt_inativacao is null
 and ie_situacao = 'A'
order by dt_liberacao desc, nr_sequencia desc
fetch first 1 rows only

name: Montar SQL Historico (msg.topic)
template:
insert into CMDKRLS_CHAT_HISTORICO (
 NR_SEQUENCIA,
 DT_ATUALIZACAO,
 NM_USUARIO,
 DT_ATUALIZACAO_NREC,
 NM_USUARIO_NREC,
 CD_PESSOA_FISICA,
 NR_SEQ_AGENDA,
 NR_SEQ_TIPO_HISTORICO,
 DT_HISTORICO,
 DS_HISTORICO,
 IE_PROCESSO
) values (
 cmdkrls_chat_historico_seq.nextval,
 sysdate,
 'chatbot',
 sysdate,
 'chatbot',
 :pessoa,
 :agenda,
 :tipo,
 sysdate,
 :desc,
 'AG'
)
info:
[DOC SIMPLES] Montar SQL Historico (msg.topic)
Tipo: sql builder
Objetivo: Monta query SQL para consulta de dados no backend.

name: SQL: Config WhatsApp por Phone ID
template:
select access_token, phone_number_id, cd_estabelecimento
from CMDKRLS_CHAT_CONFIGURACOES
where phone_number_id = :phoneNumberId
order by dt_atualizacao desc, nr_sequencia desc
fetch first 1 rows only
